###### Epigenetic Biomarkers™

## The future of diagnostics that outperforms traditional lab results

We have developed a new revolutionary tool for precision medicine: Epigenetic Biomarkers™. This transformative way of measuring biological function uses just a single drop of blood to unlock critical data about your personal health. This is the future of diagnostics.

###### Epigenetics & Innovation

Explore cutting-edge epigenetic insights that decode your health beyond traditional genetics, driving personalized healthcare solutions.

###### What is Biological Aging?

Understand how your body's age differs from your chronological age, influencing your long-term health and wellness strategies.

###### DNA-Based Nutrition

Discover personalized dietary recommendations tailored to your DNA, optimizing your health through precision nutrition.

###### Research & Collaborations

Learn about our partnerships with leading institutions, driving scientific breakthroughs and trusted, validated results.

## Understanding your biomarkers means understanding your body better – empowering you to make informed choices for a longer, healthier life.

Epigenetic Biomarkers™ are measured by analyzing your genes’ expression to deliver the most precise and actionable data about your health.

In partnership with Harvard, TruDiagnostic™ has developed over 1,670 Epigenetic Biomarkers™ that improve testing of clinical lab results, metabolomic, and proteomic measurements.   
  
This transformative approach to personal health uses just a few drops of blood to unlock deep data about cellular function – everything from vitamins, antioxidants, healthy fats, amino acids, and toxins to inflammation rates, oxidative stress, and neurocognitive factors.   
  
Traditional blood tests only give a snapshot of what a biomarker’s level was at the very moment your blood was drawn. Epigenetic Biomarkers™, on the other hand, can measure what that biomarker’s level had been for weeks or months leading up to the test. This measurement of your health over time allows for a more actionable and accurate assessment of disease risk associated with each Epigenetic Biomarker™.

###### a revolutionary tool for precision medicine

## The vast range of Epigenetic Biomarkers™ allows us to measure 20x more data about your health than an annual physical exam for a fraction of the cost.

⠀

#### GENETICS

**•** Appearance

**•** Personality

**•** Health

Genetics is the study of the genes you were born with.

Everyone has a unique genetic code that works as the blueprint on how to “build” your body. This information affects our health, appearance, and even our personality.

#### EPIGENETICS

**•** Sleep

**•** Exercise

**•** Stress

**•** Diet

**•** Disease

Epigenetics is the study of how you express those genes

And why you have the specific health outcomes you have. It is the sum of your diet, exercise, disease status, sleep, stress, and every decision you make.

#### BIOMARKERS

**•** Insulin

**•** Cholesterol

**•** Vitamin C

**•** Glucose

A biomarker is a measurable substance found in the blood that provides information about biological processes and diseases.

TruDiagnostic measures biomarkers by analyzing your genes’ expression to deliver the most precise and actionable data about your health. These epigenetic biomarkers are more accurate than similar blood biomarkers because they measure the direct effect on your DNA.

Why CHoose Trudiagnostic™

### Easy. Reliable. Precise

###### Predictive Power

Epigenetic biomarkers™ measure your body’s biological function, such as your aging, nutrition, and disease risk, by testing more than 1 million CpG sites on your DNA.

###### Reliability & Precision

Our Epigenetic Biomarkers™ are shown to be more accurate at predicting disease than traditional biomarkers measured by clinical labs for a fraction of the cost.

###### Ease of Collection

Measuring your Epigenetic Biomarkers™ is simple. We deliver the test directly to your door for you to take when convenient. No Appointments. No Lab Fees. No Vials of Blood.

###### Science You Can Trust

## We’re Leaders in Epigenetics

Led by a team of world-class doctors and epigenetic scientists with a focus on clinical research.

Committed to using only the most advanced DNA methylation algorithms and Epigenetic Biomarker™ advancements.

Developed in partnership with top medical institutions like Harvard, Yale, Duke, and Columbia, leveraging the largest private DNA methylation database in the world.

Resolute about having all algorithms be peer-reviewed and published for full transparency.

TruAge™

## The Most Accurate and Precise Algorithms

With access to the largest private DNA methylation database, our algorithms measure hundreds of thousands of markers on your DNA to deliver results that are fully personalized to your unique biology.

### Measure Your Biological Age  & Aging Speed

Created with science from Harvard, Yale, and Duke, the TruAge™ test measures +75 key biomarkers for longevity to give you the most precise, accurate, and actionable insights about your aging, including how fast 11 key organ systems are aging.

[Shop TruAge™](https://shop.trudiagnostic.com/products/truage-complete-epigenetic-collection)

developed with HARVARD

#### OMICmAge™

The OMICmAge™ algorithm is one of the most precise and comprehensive methods for measuring biological aging.

This multi-omic approach analyzes dozens of proteins, metabolites, and clinical biomarkers, providing a detailed picture of how your body is aging. The OMICmAge™ report helps identify factors contributing to accelerated or decelerated aging, allowing you to make informed lifestyle and medical decisions.

Multi-omic Analysis

The OMICmAge™ algorithm utilizes a comprehensive multi-omic approach, analyzing dozens of proteins, metabolites, and clinical biomarkers. This detailed analysis provides an in-depth understanding of your biological aging process, offering insights that go beyond traditional methods.

Precision and Accuracy

OMICmAge™ is one of the most precise and comprehensive methods for measuring biological aging. By examining multiple biological markers, it ensures highly accurate results that reflect the true state of your body’s aging process.

Actionable Insights

The OMICmAge™ report helps identify factors contributing to accelerated or decelerated aging. These actionable insights empower you to make informed lifestyle and medical decisions, enabling you to optimize your health and potentially slow down the aging process.

[Learn More](/omicmage)

Biomarkers

Proteins

Metabolites

developed with YALE

#### SYMPHONYAge™

Offers a revolutionary way to understand aging across multiple organ systems.

This system-specific epigenetic aging algorithm evaluates how different parts of your body age both independently and synchronously. By analyzing the aging process of organs such as the brain, liver, heart, and immune system, SYMPHONYAge™ helps you pinpoint areas where targeted interventions can have the most significant impact.

Comprehensive Organ System Analysis

SYMPHONYAge™ provides a groundbreaking approach to aging by evaluating multiple organ systems independently and synchronously. This system-specific epigenetic aging algorithm offers insights into how organs such as the brain, liver, heart, and immune system age, helping you understand the unique aging process of each part of your body.

Tailored Health Interventions

With SYMPHONYAge™, you can pinpoint areas where targeted health interventions will be most effective. By understanding the specific aging patterns of different organs, you can make informed lifestyle and medical decisions to optimize your overall health and slow the aging process.

Detailed Reports

Our detailed SYMPHONYAge™ reports offer comprehensive insights into the aging processes of your various organ systems. These easy-to-read reports include actionable recommendations and highlight key areas for improvement, empowering you to take control of your health and aging journey.

[Learn More](/symphony-age)

developed with DUKE AND COLOMBIA

#### DunedinPACE™

The DunedinPACE™ algorithm  measures the rate at which your body is aging.

This test is ideal for those who want to track the effectiveness of their lifestyle interventions over time. By comparing your pace of aging to a standard calendar year, PACE provides a clear indication of whether your health efforts are slowing down or accelerating your biological aging.

Rate of Aging

The DunedinPACE™ algorithm accurately measures the rate at which your body is aging. By comparing your biological aging pace to a standard calendar year, it provides a clear picture of whether your body is aging faster, slower, or at the same rate as expected.

Regular Monitoring

This test is perfect for those who want to track the effectiveness of their lifestyle interventions over time. Regular monitoring with DunedinPACE™ allows you to see how your health efforts are impacting your biological age, giving you the motivation and data needed to stay on track.

Focused Insights

DunedinPACE™ offers focused insights into your aging process, helping you understand the impact of various factors on your biological age. These insights enable you to make informed decisions about lifestyle and medical interventions to optimize your health and slow down the aging process.

[Learn More](/dunedin-pace)

TruHealth™

## Measure Your Unique Nutritional & Biological Systems Health

The algorithms used for TruHealth™ tests 105+ biomarkers for 19 health categories that are key to biological function. These include:

[Shop TruHealth™](https://shop.trudiagnostic.com/products/truhealth)

Depression

PCOS

Obesity

Heart Disease

Cancer

Infertility

Fatigue

Weight Issues

Poor Immune Function

Hypothyroidism

Hypertension

Poor Athletic Performance

Autoimmune

Type 2 Diabetes

ADD/ADHD

Malnutrition

Maldigestion

###### TruHealth™ developed with Harvard

## DNA-Based Nutrition  & Systems Health

Insights into your health that outperform traditional lab results.

This transformative way of measuring health uses just a few drops of blood to unlock deep data about your personal health – everything from vitamins, antioxidants, healthy fats, amino acids, and toxins to inflammation rates, oxidative stress, and neurocognitive factors.  Whether you’re looking to boost your nutrition, reduce toxins, improve sleep, or enhance metabolic function, TruHealth gives you a personalized roadmap to target deficiencies and take actions to improve.

[Learn More](/truhealth)

### FAQs

What is epigenetics?

Epigenetics refers to changes in gene activity that do not alter the DNA sequence but can affect gene expression. These changes are influenced by various factors such as lifestyle, environment, and age. Understanding epigenetics allows us to see how external factors can impact our genetic code and overall health.

How accurate are the test results?

Our tests are developed in collaboration with leading academic institutions and are based on cutting-edge research. We measure over hundreds of thousands of CpG locations on your DNA to provide highly accurate and reliable results.

Is it necessary to stop medications or supplements prior to testing?

No, you can test on your current medications and supplements. In some cases you make want to discuss with your physician stopping supplements or medications prior to testing.

Does insurance cover this test?

No, this test is not currently covered by insurance. However, you can use eligible HSA/FSA.

How does TruHealth™ differ from TruAge™?

Our TruHealth™ test ensures your nutritional, metabolic, immune, and cognitive health are functioning at their peak to support longevity goals. Our TruAge™ test helps you track those goals and stay ahead of the aging curve by measuring your biological age, speed of aging, and key longevity metrics. Together, they provide a full view of your overall health.

Are TruDiagnostic™ tests CLIA certified?

Yes, our laboratory services are CLIA certified and HIPAA compliant, ensuring the highest standards of data security and patient confidentiality.

Advancing Innovation Through Collaborative Science

# TruDiscovery Grant

Supporting researchers with funding and resources to accelerate breakthroughs in epigenetics, drive scientific discovery, and transform the future of personalized medicine.

## Funding Innovation

We are dedicated to ensuring resources are allocated to projects with the greatest potential for real-world impact.

###### Transformative Funding

Selected applicants will receive **$400,000 in funding** to bring their project to life, empowering groundbreaking advancements in the field.

###### A Reward for Your Network

Know someone who would be a great fit? Earn a **$10,000 referral bonus** if your recommendation leads to a successful grant recipient—no participation required.

###### Shape the Future

This is more than funding; it’s an opportunity to drive impact, accelerate progress, and be part of a transformative movement.

[Apply Now](https://forumstrudiagnostic.jotform.com/250565681313052)

### Important Deadlines

#### TruDiscovery Grant

Our flagship initiative, the TruDiscovery Grant, provides funding and resources to support high-potential research projects. We seek to empower scientists, startups, and academic institutions tackling the most pressing challenges in healthcare, biotech, and emerging technologies as it relates to the field of Epigenetics.

Key Benefits:

Access to funding for early-stage and translational research

Mentorship and collaboration with industry leaders

Opportunities for commercialization and scaling innovations

Access to funding for eThis grant award includes allocations to cover indirect costs, ensuring research sustainability despite NIH funding cuts.arly-stage and translational research

[Submit Your Application](https://forumstrudiagnostic.jotform.com/250565681313052)

### Who Should Apply?

We welcome applications from researchers, startups, biotech firms, and academic institutions with bold, disruptive ideas. Our programs are designed to support those pushing the boundaries of scientific discovery and technological advancement.

#### Eligibility Requirements

To qualify, applicants must:

###### Develop an algorithmic tool or intellectual property (IP) utilizing DNA methylation

###### Agree to license the tool upon completion

###### Examples of IP Types

Our past collaborations have resulted in groundbreaking  
advancements, including:

Biological Age Clocks

[DunedinPACE™](https://elifesciences.org/articles/73420)[OMICmAge™](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2023.10.16.562114v1.article-info#aff-1)[SYMPHONYAge™](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2023.07.13.548904v1.full.pdf)[Epigenetic Biomarker Proxies™](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39677461/)[Imprintome array](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2024.01.15.575646v1)

Methylation Risk Scores

Canine Aging Clock

Preprocessing Methods

Minfi

SeSAMe

WatRmelon

Skin Aging Clocks

### Who We Are

At TruDiagnostic™, we are dedicated to accelerating innovation through strategic partnerships and pioneering research initiatives. As a leading epigenetic testing company and CLIA processing lab, we specialize in aging algorithms and DNAm biomarker identification. Since our inception in 2020, we have diligently constructed one of the most extensive private methylation databases globally, boasting over 100,000 patients tested. Our mission is to bridge the gap between groundbreaking discoveries and real-world applications, fostering a global network of scientists, entrepreneurs, and institutions committed to transforming healthcare and biotechnology.

###### Ryan Smith

Co-founder & Director of Research

###### Lena Wallace

Global Sales Executive

###### Varun Dwaraka, PhD

Director of Bioinformatics

###### Natàlia Carreras, PhD

Associate Director of Bioinformatics

###### Laura Balagué Dobón, PhD

Bioinformatics Scientist

###### Ilinca Giosan, PhD

Bioinformatics Scientist

###### Sayf Al-Deen Hassouneh, PhD

Bioinformatics Scientist

#### Ongoing Collaborations

At TruDiagnostic™, we’re advancing research to better understand aging through innovative DNA methylation studies and epigenetic analysis. Our collaborations focus on how lifestyle choices, such as diet and exercise, affect aging, and we are developing biomarkers for more precise age-related health interventions. We are proud to be part of this cutting-edge work, contributing to breakthroughs that have the potential to improve health outcomes across the globe.  
  
For more information, check out our research page [here](/old-pages/research).

#### How TruDiagnostic’s™ Data Can Help

Access to our internal cohort of over 50,000+ patients to be used for validation or training of your datasets is available upon request. Please see details regarding our dataset below:

* Multi-Omic
* Interventional Data
* Wearable Data
* Lifestyle data
* Medications Used Data
* +4,500 longitudinal participants

### Ready to Apply?

[Submit Your Application](https://forumstrudiagnostic.jotform.com/250565681313052)

### Register for the Upcoming Webinar

[Register Here!](https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_T4gF6gweSUS2E4dQb9J8HA)

### Application Requirements

Organization Information

Applicants will provide: Organization Name & Contact Information, Project Title & Summary, Biosketch.

Statement of Need

Clearly define why your project is essential, including **problem statements**, **relevance** and **supporting data**.

Project Description & Goals

Detail your vision and execution strategy: **Objectives**, **Metrics for Success**, **Reporting Plan**, **Activities & Methods**, **Timeline**, and **Innovation/Impact** statement.

Budget & Financial Information

Break down your financial plan: **Budget Overview**, **Other Funding Sources**, **Sustainability Plan**

Organizational Background

Tell us about your experience and credibility: **History of the Organization**, **Leadership & Team**, **Past Grants or Success Stories** – Examples of managing similar funding

Letters of Support (If Applicable)

* **Endorsements** – Letters from stakeholders, industry experts, or key partners
* **Community or Partner Commitment** – Proof of collaboration or co-funding

### Questions? Contact Us!

###### Lena Wallace

Scientific Collaborations Lead

[lena.wallace@trudiagnostic.com](mailto:lena.wallace@trudiagnostic.com?subject=Question%3A%20TruDiscovery%20Grant)

## Why DNA Methylation Matters for Interventional Trials

Methylation patterns are powerful because they help reveal the interplay between genes, health behaviors, stressors, and more. TruDiagnostic’s tools highlight actionable epigenetic signals among the DNA noise. By tracking methylation changes over days or months, we capture the longitudinal impact of specific treatments and interventions to gauge effectiveness and reveal better targets for personalized therapy.  
  
On its own, DNA hints at which diseases may develop and which areas of resilience a patient may possess, giving clues to how that person’s healthspan may unfold. In this way, DNA resembles a hard copy road map: good at showing the big picture, but static and missing crucial details.   
  
Supplementing DNA with epigenetic methylation pattern recognition yields a much richer depiction of how a person’s genomic journey is progressing. By analyzing methylation and Epigenetic Biomarker Proxies (EBPs), researchers and clinicians can more clearly discern which genomic possibilities are becoming realities. This enables more targeted interventions and a better understanding of how to lower diseases and promote resiliency for each individual person.

## How to Get the Most Out of DNA Methylation in Your Research

Ready to collaborate?

[Get In Touch](#form)

Methylation patterns are powerful because they help reveal the interplay between genes, health behaviors, stressors, and more. TruDiagnostic’s tools highlight actionable epigenetic signals among the DNA noise. By tracking methylation changes over days or months, we capture the longitudinal impact of specific treatments and interventions to gauge effectiveness and reveal better targets for personalized therapy.

Validated, Scalable Data Foundation

Interventional research depends on statistical power and biological coverage. TruDiagnostic has built the world’s largest DNA methylation dataset, enabling partners to analyze intervention effects across diverse populations and contexts. Paired with purpose-built analytical software, this foundation supports faster signal detection, deeper stratification, and more confident conclusions.

Multi-System Biological Insights

DNA methylation captures biological change across multiple physiological systems. Partners can interrogate aging dynamics, treatment response, disease risk, and mechanism-level signals—supporting applications ranging from companion diagnostics and drug development to OMICs and bioinformatics research.

Longitudinal & Re-Analysis Ready

Our datasets are designed for reuse, not single-read outcomes. Researchers can examine intervention effects across time, re-analyze cohorts as new hypotheses emerge, and apply future biomarker frameworks without the need to recollect samples–maximizing the long-term value of each study.

Proprietary Analytical Layer

We extend the value of methylation data through proprietary algorithms and epigenetic models that surface meaningful associations, reduce biological noise, and translate high-dimensional data into interpretable, trial-relevant insights.

Ready to collaborate?

[Get In Touch](#)

Our DNA Methylation Tools

## Our research partners benefit from custom arrays and multi-clock algorithms to make real differences in real clients’ lives.

[Methylation Risk  
Scores

Predict disease onset and progression using validated DNA methylation–based risk models. Enable patient stratification, cohort enrichment, and measurable intervention impact across cardiometabolic, neurodegenerative, and inflammatory pathways.](#)[Epigenetic Biomarker Proxies

Quantify biological systems and pathway activity beyond traditional biomarkers. Capture inflammation, metabolic function, immune signaling, and other intervention-responsive mechanisms using genome-wide methylation signatures.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6690e254f4f07d1a469bb330/68488d5cd892e52132c31194_EBP.pdf)[Cellular Deconvolution

Resolve cell-type composition shifts to understand treatment response at the systems level. Measure biological aging and rate-of-aging changes longitudinally. Develop methylation-based markers to identify responders and optimize therapeutic targeting. Support trial design, patient selection, and precision treatment strategies with clinically relevant stratification signals.](#)[Skin Clock

Non-invasive epigenetic aging assessment using skin-derived signals. Ideal for dermatology, longevity, cosmetic, and regenerative medicine trials requiring localized biological aging measurement.](#)

## Do Interventions Change DNA Methylation?

Yes, epigenetic methylation patterns change as a result of their environment.

For example, well-designed interventions can remove undesirable methyl groups and free up binding sites in CpG islands, reactivating healthy gene expression; they can also promote positive methylation, helping prevent diseases and maintain healthy cellular functions.

Using appropriate arrays, bisulfite sequencing, biological clock models, and computational algorithms, our partner researchers can gain insights into the impact of various interventions with greater power and precision than ever before.

Lifestyle  
Interventions

Even small shifts in health behaviors can have large impacts on the healthspan. Our habits like exercise and calorie restriction can reduce inflammation-linked hypermethylation, and stress management can prevent cortisol-induced change.

Nutrititional   
Interventions

What we eat can affect methylation by acting on metabolic pathways that affect signaling cascades. Diets rich in methyl donors, such as folate from greens, foster balanced, stable methylation, while polyphenols reduce hypermethylation.

Pharmacological Interventions

DNA methyltransferase (DNMT) inhibitors like azacitidine demethylate directly silence genes during cancer therapy, while certain other inhibitors indirectly affect methylation via chromatin remodeling.

Procedural  
Interventions

Protocols such as hyperbaric chambers (oxygen therapy), saunas (heat and infrared exposures), exosome therapy, and stem cell therapies can materially affect methylation patterns.

## Supercharge Your Next Interventional Trial With  DNA Methylation

We depend on research partners as dedicated as you are to jointly expand our epigenetic knowledge base.

When you partner with us, you gain access not only to a database of epigenetic data from the largest DNAm database in the world – spanning more than 80,000 patients – but also the analytic tools and experts to make sense of it all.     
  
TruDiagnostic lets you sift through genomic data with greater speed and precision and test your hypotheses more robustly. Because you are accessing an entire set of biological aging algorithms and not just a single model, your research studies are set up for success from the beginning. More specimens, more data, more experience, and more meaningful conclusions. It all adds up to better research and better overall care.

[Get In Touch](#)
